item.title: Can someone explain...
item.description: Can someone explain why TikTok is a bigger national security concern than a social media platform run by a South African technofeudal oligarch actively interfering in our elections and sabotaging our national interests here and abroad?

item.title: Regular-sized meme dump
item.description:
I've had this one for almost 6 years but it's like no time has passed at all lol
Bring out the purse Dewey
Because what else could it possibly mean?? I'm desperate to know
Their lives depend on you and they know it
Somebody check on Timmy he's not having a good time
I will marry anyone who can get me their Caramelts
Objection; asked
and answered
This baby grew up to pester Shrek to "do the roar"
I love a resourceful man

item.title: The last (colorized) photo of Hachiko, the loyal dog who waited for over 9 years outside Shibuya Station for his owner to return, even after he had passed away.

item.title: Getting caught using AI in class
item.description: One of my students recently told me with complete confidence that AI is to her generation what calculators were to mine. Once a source of outrage, eventually accepted as normal. What do you think?

item.dc:creator: Atratvs

item.title: My Gladio Cosplay!
item.description:
SnarkyJayCosplay here! Wanted to drop my cosplay of Gladio from Final Fantasy XV. He’s one of my favorite characters of all time so I had to bring him back.
I built the sword like, 7 years ago and never revisited the look. But after replaying the game recently I decided to debut an updated version— my friends at OperationShutter took these pics and I edited the backgrounds!
This is the shirt— I’ve had the text patches forever but I applied them with contact cement, hammered in studs by hand, and then I drew all of the feathers and the eagle free-hand on pleather and glued them on as well! I also made the strap on the bottom out of an old belt I painted black and added some buttons.
The character for reference. He’s kinda the epitome of toxic masculinity but I love him.
Bonus: me cosplaying the same character back in 2017. I’ve come a long way!
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum

item.title: Images of Note: smug
item.description:
F E E T
Love how even the Father of Capitalism thought Landlords were cunts.
Do not.
WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG

a
mood
This is literally the thought processes of people who drive onto level crossings when the barriers are down or the people who walk on train tracks
Love how they chose a picture of an actual gay couple for this (iirc they're engaged).
it's always the terrible fucking manwhores.
oh no
this is basically what life is like.
